title: الشيف كريم
active_visual_locks: bold outline, warm Cairo palette (ochre, terracotta, soft yellow), expressive eyebrows
fast comedic reaction shots — character faces capable of wide exaggerated expressions
Arabic text overlays added in post-production, never baked into the generated video
Karim: messy dark curly hair | warm brown eyes | short trimmed beard | green rubber wristband on RIGHT hand | cracked Android phone | home apron over blue hoodie or white t-shirt
Karim's green wristband must appear on his right hand in every shot where his hands are visible
the blue and white speckled pot is a recurring visual anchor in the home kitchen
food must look craveable and glossy, never childish or flat
Cairo sound texture: azaan, traffic, street vendors audible in background
warm color temperature always, no cold filters or blue tones
same wardrobe and props every episode unless the script explicitly describes a change
same wardrobe and props in every episode unless the script explicitly describes a change
food must look craveable and glossy — never childish or flat
warm color temperature always — no cold filters or blue tones
no photoreal humans, no text baked into the scene, no random characters

protagonist_bible.name: كريم منصور
visual_locks: messy dark curly hair, always slightly disheveled
default outfit: old blue hoodie or faded white t-shirt
chef whites only when working in a professional kitchen
off-white home apron when cooking at home
green rubber wristband on the right hand — always present
budget Android phone with a cracked bottom-right corner
usually has a small flour smudge or sauce splash somewhere on him
protagonist_bible.signature_gesture: rubs the back of his neck when thinking or embarrassed

supporting_cast_bible.name: نور
visual_locks: camera or phone always in hand

location_bible: HOME KITCHEN: small tight apartment kitchen, white tiles with a crack near the window above the sink, warm yellow overhead light, laundry lines visible through the window, blue and white speckled pot always on the stove, herbs hanging near the window, cheap ring light propped against a bottle of oil
THE ROOF: same Shubra building, Cairo skyline in distance, shot at golden hour or late night
NIL & SPICE KITCHEN: professional open kitchen, stainless steel, hot and loud (Episodes 16-29)
WORKSHOP: converted apartment cooking school, worn tables, Chef Hatem's domain (Episodes 10-15)
CAIRO STREETS: Shubra neighborhood, laundry overhead, koshary shops, urban Cairo texture

episodes.name: فول بالكمأة بـ1500 جنيه... بس طلع إيه؟
episodes.summary: كريم منصور، في محاولته الأولى لصنع فيديو تيك توك، يحاول تحضير طبق فول مدمس 'جورميه' بزيت الكمأة وبيض بوش في مطبخ عائلته الهادئ. تنتهي المحاولة بكارثة كوميدية: البيضة تتكسر، زيت الكمأة ينسكب، ويحرق يده. رغم الفشل، ينشر الفيديو ويظل متفائلاً بشكل لا يتزعزع، حتى مع 34 مشاهدة فقط (معظمها من صديقه فارس).
episodes.cliffhanger: رغم 34 مشاهدة فقط، كريم يبتسم بثقة ويضع كابشن 'أكل مصري راقي، استنونا!' مؤكداً إيمانه الراسخ بقدراته ومستقبله كشيف تيك توك، غير آبه بالواقع.
continuity_updates: Introduce Karim as a passionate but untrained home cook, making his first TikTok video.
Establish Karim's home kitchen as his primary filming location, highlighting the blue and white speckled pot.
Introduce Karim's cracked Android phone as his filming device.
Implicitly introduce Fares as Karim's loyal (and perhaps only) initial audience/sidekick through a quick visual gag.
Show Karim's signature green rubber wristband and his neck-rubbing gesture as character tells.
Set the tone for 'Act 1: The Failed TikToker' - warm chaos, hopeful, slightly embarrassing, with a strong undercurrent of unshakeable optimism.
Emphasize the cultural tension of 'gourmet' ful to generate comment bait.
episodes.continuity_goal: تأسيس كريم كشخص عاطفي ولكنه غير مدرب، وتقديم فارس كرفيق.
episodes.character_sheet_prompt_en: Karim Mansour is a 2D cartoon, 24-year-old Egyptian man with messy dark curly hair (always slightly disheveled), warm brown eyes, a short trimmed beard, and a green rubber wristband (always present) on his RIGHT hand. He wears a home apron over a blue hoodie or faded white t-shirt. He often carries a budget Android phone with a cracked bottom-right corner. His style is expressive, bold outlines, and consistent with Cairo-neighborhood warmth. Fares is a 2D cartoon, tall and lanky Egyptian man, almost always in an Ahly jersey or a puffer jacket, carrying a cheap phone gimbal or selfie stick, with wide expressive eyes. Characters are stylized and consistent—not photoreal.
